name: IntuneCD
description: A powerful Python package for backup and continuous delivery of Microsoft Intune configurations. Backs up configurations to Git repositories, detects changes automatically, propagates updates between environments, and integrates with Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions pipelines.
author: Tobias Almen

securityCheck.aiSummary: The IntuneCD codebase demonstrates typical admin tooling for Intune/Graph data backup. No obfuscated code, remote code execution, credential harvesting, or direct external data exfiltration is evident. There are minor security considerations around at-rest data generated by enrich_documentation, credential handling (tokens), and the use of dynamic imports. Overall, the code appears aligned with expected, secure Graph API usage and authentication flows when properly access-controlled.
